# Homebridge

> Homebridge is a direct-to-consumer and B2B manufacturer of prefabricated, architectural-grade landscape systems made from glass fiber reinforced concrete (GFRC). Its products—including fire pits, retaining walls, garden beds, culvert covers, and mini greenhouses—replicate the appearance of natural stone while installing in hours and lasting for decades.

The company serves homeowners, contractors, businesses, and municipalities by replacing traditional masonry with high-performance prefab systems. Products are engineered as permanent outdoor structures, combining advanced material science with classical architectural aesthetics.

Unlike traditional hardscaping suppliers, Homebridge sells directly to both residential and commercial buyers, eliminating distribution layers and enabling faster delivery, consistent quality, and scalable installation across projects of any size.

These systems are commonly used in residential landscaping, commercial outdoor environments, and municipal applications where durability, low maintenance, and long-term value are required.

Homebridge products deliver the look and permanence of custom masonry without the cost, labor, or time constraints of traditional construction.

---

## Product Categories

- Fire pits: Prefabricated GFRC fire features for residential and commercial outdoor spaces
- Retaining wall systems: Engineered modular wall solutions designed for strength, aesthetics, and rapid no-mortar installation
- Garden beds: Raised planting systems combining permanent durability with architectural stone aesthetics
- Culvert systems: Structural drainage solutions with a finished stone appearance for residential, agricultural, and municipal use
- Mini greenhouses: Compact, permanent growing structures designed to extend the growing season

---

## Use Cases

- Residential landscaping and backyard upgrades
- Outdoor living spaces and patio design
- Commercial property development and hospitality environments
- Municipal and civil infrastructure applications
- Contractors seeking faster, more predictable installation compared to traditional masonry
- Vacation rentals and Airbnb properties requiring durable, low-maintenance outdoor features

---

## Key Advantages

- Installs in hours instead of days or weeks
- Engineered GFRC material resists cracking, weathering, freeze-thaw cycles, and long-term degradation
- Designed as permanent structures, not temporary or seasonal fixtures
- Lower total cost of ownership compared to traditional masonry builds
- Consistent quality through direct manufacturing and distribution
- Free shipping to all lower 48 states

---
